hero.title: Web & Mobile Developer
hero.subtitle: I transform ideas into high-impact digital experiences. Over 10 years building tailored solutions.

about.paragraph1: I'm Ignacio Arias, a web and mobile developer with over 10 years of experience building tailored digital solutions. I specialize in creating modern, fast, and scalable applications.
about.paragraph2: My passion is transforming complex ideas into elegant digital products that deliver real results. I work with an agile methodology, focused on detail and performance, always keeping the client at the center of the process.

services.web_desc: Modern, fast and responsive web applications built with the latest market technologies.
services.mobile_desc: Native and hybrid applications for iOS and Android with smooth, high-performance user experience.
services.pwa_desc: PWAs combining the best of the web and native apps: speed, offline support, and easy distribution.
services.landing_desc: Conversion-optimized landing pages designed to attract clients and boost your brand.
services.consulting_desc: Software architecture advisory, code review, and technology strategy for your project.
services.backend_desc: REST API development, third-party service integrations, and scalable backend architectures.

contact.subtitle: Let's talk and make it happen. I reply to inquiries within 24 hours.
contact.whatsapp_desc: Message me directly on WhatsApp for a quick response.
contact.linkedin_desc: Connect with me on LinkedIn and explore opportunities together.
contact.email_desc: Send me an email and I'll get back to you shortly.
